odeProperty.value: This eXeLearning project is designed to provide students with an interactive learning experience. It includes clear explanations, activities, and resources that help students understand the topic step by step. It also encourages active participation and the development of key skills through practical tasks.

odeComponent.htmlView: This project is designed as a learning situation in which students will create a sustainable travel guide about English-speaking countries. Students will use digital tools such as Canva, Genially or VistaCreate to design an interactive and visually attractive guide. The project promotes creativity, digital competence, collaboration and environmental awareness.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260402173804541P7F","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"(3 - 4 students)","textTextarea":"

This project is designed as a learning situation in which students will create a sustainable travel guide about English-speaking countries. Students will use digital tools such as Canva, Genially or VistaCreate to design an interactive and visually attractive guide. The project promotes creativity, digital competence, collaboration and environmental awareness.

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

{"ideviceId":"20260406200317383GYI","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView: This project is aimed at students of 3º ESO. Students will explore different English-speaking countries and design a sustainable travel guide. The main goal is to develop communicative, digital and social skills while promoting sustainability and responsible tourism. The project follows the principles of Universal Design for Learning (UDL), ensuring inclusion and accessibility for all students.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260402174218147GU4","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

This project is aimed at students of 3º ESO. Students will explore different English-speaking countries and design a sustainable travel guide. The main goal is to develop communicative, digital and social skills while promoting sustainability and responsible tourism. The project follows the principles of Universal Design for Learning (UDL), ensuring inclusion and accessibility for all students.

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

{"ideviceId":"20260406173324950IIG","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

\n

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView: Digital safety is very important in our daily lives because we use the internet for learning, communication, and fun. It helps us protect our personal information, such as passwords, photos, and private messages. By following simple rules, like using strong passwords, not sharing personal data, and being careful with unknown links, we can stay safe online. In this infographic, you will find easy tips to help you use the internet in a smart and secure way.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260406174602919X7C","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Digital safety is very important in our daily lives because we use the internet for learning, communication, and fun. It helps us protect our personal information, such as passwords, photos, and private messages. By following simple rules, like using strong passwords, not sharing personal data, and being careful with unknown links, we can stay safe online. In this infographic, you will find easy tips to help you use the internet in a smart and secure way.

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

{"ideviceId":"20260406174355116SJM","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView: This project is about creating a travel guide for a route in an English-speaking country. You will choose places to visit and give useful information for travelers. You will also include ideas to travel in a sustainable way, helping to protect the environment and support local communities. Your guide should be clear, interesting, and easy to understand.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260406180246190NP0","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

This project is about creating a travel guide for a route in an English-speaking country. You will choose places to visit and give useful information for travelers. You will also include ideas to travel in a sustainable way, helping to protect the environment and support local communities. Your guide should be clear, interesting, and easy to understand.
 
 
 

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

{"ideviceId":"20260406180142236587","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

\n

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView: There is a video that shows how to create a travel guide using Canva. In this video, you will learn step by step how to design your own travel guide in a simple and creative way. It will help you organize information, add images, and make your project look professional and attractive.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260406172846GTDUOB","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

There is a video that shows how to create a travel guide using Canva. In this video, you will learn step by step how to design your own travel guide in a simple and creative way. It will help you organize information, add images, and make your project look professional and attractive.
 



","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
This Didactic Guide presents the planning and organisation of the teaching and learning process for this unit. It includes the learning objectives, contents, and evaluation criteria that will be used to assess students’ progress throughout the course.

It also specifies the different types of grouping used in the classroom, such as individual work, pair work, and group work, in order to organise students’ participation effectively.

In addition, it includes the use of digital tools and resources to support learning, such as interactive activities, presentations, and online platforms that help to reinforce and practise the contents.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"202604061844197148IB","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

This Didactic Guide presents the planning and organisation of the teaching and learning process for this unit. It includes the learning objectives, contents, and evaluation criteria that will be used to assess students’ progress throughout the course.

\n

It also specifies the different types of grouping used in the classroom, such as individual work, pair work, and group work, in order to organise students’ participation effectively.

\n

In addition, it includes the use of digital tools and resources to support learning, such as interactive activities, presentations, and online platforms that help to reinforce and practise the contents.

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

{"ideviceId":"20260406184232423NNW","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

\n

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
You will find all the assessment instruments used in this unit in the following document. These instruments will be used to evaluate your learning process and your progress throughout the unit. They include different types of activities such as written tasks, oral activities, projects, and tests.

Please read the document carefully to understand how you will be assessed.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260406184616855DJ0","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

You will find all the assessment instruments used in this unit in the following document. These instruments will be used to evaluate your learning process and your progress throughout the unit. They include different types of activities such as written tasks, oral activities, projects, and tests.

\n

Please read the document carefully to understand how you will be assessed.

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

{"ideviceId":"20260406184507043KNU","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Author
This project has been created by Noelia Espinar Espejo

Project Description
This eXeLearning project has been designed as a didactic resource for students. It includes a set of activities, resources and evaluation tools aimed at developing digital competence, collaboration and responsible use of technology.

This material is intended for educational purposes and can be used and adapted by other teachers in their classrooms.

License
This work is licensed under a Creative Commons license.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260403093643698TC6","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Author
This project has been created by Noelia Espinar Espejo

Project Description
This eXeLearning project has been designed as a didactic resource for students. It includes a set of activities, resources and evaluation tools aimed at developing digital competence, collaboration and responsible use of technology.

This material is intended for educational purposes and can be used and adapted by other teachers in their classrooms.

License
This work is licensed under a Creative Commons license. 

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
General information about this educational resource
Title TRAVELLING BROADENS THE MIND
Description This eXeLearning project is designed to provide students with an interactive learning experience. It includes clear explanations, activities, and resources that help students understand the topic step by step. It also encourages active participation and the development of key skills through practical tasks.
Authorship NOELIA ESPINAR ESPEJO
License public domain

This content was created with eXeLearning, your free and open source editor to create educational resources.

Download .elpx file

Content curation is important because it helps us find and organize the huge amount of information available today. By selecting reliable and relevant content, we can understand topics more easily and avoid confusion or misinformation. It also saves time and allows us to focus on what really matters, making learning more effective and meaningful. In the following pages, you will find useful resources for both students and teachers.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"202604061804588407Q6","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Content curation is important because it helps us find and organize the huge amount of information available today. By selecting reliable and relevant content, we can understand topics more easily and avoid confusion or misinformation. It also saves time and allows us to focus on what really matters, making learning more effective and meaningful. In the following pages, you will find useful resources for both students and teachers.

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView: This project timeline shows the different stages of the project and the tasks you will complete step by step. It will help you organize your work, manage your time, and understand what you need to do in each phase. By following the timeline, you will be able to work more efficiently and complete your project successfully.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"202604061841395176YO","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

This project timeline shows the different stages of the project and the tasks you will complete step by step. It will help you organize your work, manage your time, and understand what you need to do in each phase. By following the timeline, you will be able to work more efficiently and complete your project successfully.

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

{"ideviceId":"20260404122907146RKD","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Here you can find a collection of teacher resources that I use in my classes. These materials include activities, worksheets, and ideas to help students learn in a fun and effective way.

You will find resources for different topics, especially focused on English learning, including grammar, vocabulary, and speaking activities.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260406182109871PZG","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Here you can find a collection of teacher resources that I use in my classes. These materials include activities, worksheets, and ideas to help students learn in a fun and effective way.

\n

You will find resources for different topics, especially focused on English learning, including grammar, vocabulary, and speaking activities.

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

{"ideviceId":"20260406180952464V0V","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Here you can find a collection of student resources to help you learn and practise English. These materials include activities, worksheets, and useful ideas to improve your skills.

You will find resources for grammar, vocabulary, reading, and speaking. Use them to study, practise, and improve your English at your own pace.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260406182235519TEG","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Here you can find a collection of student resources to help you learn and practise English. These materials include activities, worksheets, and useful ideas to improve your skills.

\n

You will find resources for grammar, vocabulary, reading, and speaking. Use them to study, practise, and improve your English at your own pace.

","textFeedbackInput":"Show Feedback","textFeedbackTextarea":""}
